TEXT: Remove the current #pReagent, or close the menu if there is none.
Consume [E] and the current #pReagents to brew a potion.
This #pReagent typically provides the primary effect of the potion.
This #pReagent typically provides numerical changes to [${modID}:PotIcon] #yPotency.
This #pReagent typically provides numerical changes to [${modID}:PotIcon] #yPotency.
This #pReagent typically affects what causes a potion to #yReact during combat.
This #pReagent typically applies a wide variety of unique effects.

Consume [E] and the current #pReagents to brew a potion.

#yPotency: The strength of the potion, starting at #b

TEXT: Made with what you could scavenge.
Use #yReagents and [E] to create a #yPotion during #rCombat!
You can only brew potions during #rCombat!
Start runs with 2 potions worth of random Reagents.
Unlink reagents from normal combat card rewards.
Add an extra potion slot. Disabling it will remove that potion with the slot.
Reagents replace Colorless cards in shops.
Enable 'Clarity Mode', adding keyword tips and a tip button to the Alchemy Menu.
EXTRA_TEXT: Clarity Mode in the Config is #gENABLED!
Clarity Mode in the Config is #rDISABLED!

TEXT: Shows how many of each type of #yReagent you own.

EXTRA_TEXT: Click the #yLetters to change between #yReagent types. You need to use ALL #b5 types and [E] to #yBrew a potion. NL NL #bClick #bto #bContinue. #b1 #bof #b9.
The smaller the number for an effect, the slower #yPotency changes will affect it. NL NL #bClick #bto #bContinue. #b2 #bof #b9.
#yGrowth only lasts until the end of combat, be mindful what you brew and when. NL NL #bClick #bto #bContinue. #b3 #bof #b9.
Stacking #yReactions will cause a potion to grow more slowly during each #yReaction. NL NL #bClick #bto #bContinue. #b4 #bof #b9.
The effects on a potion resolve #yTop to #yBottom first, then #yLeft to #yRight where applicable. NL NL #bClick #bto #bContinue. #b5 #bof #b9.
Making a potion with no practical ability to #yReact can be the right choice at times. NL NL #bClick #bto #bContinue. #b6 #bof #b9.
You can brew potions in easy fights using leftover energy to have them for later, harder fights. NL NL #bClick #bto #bContinue. #b7 #bof #b9.
If the potion only has small effects, #yPotency losses can be nearly ignored. NL NL #bClick #bfor #bmore #btips. NL NL #bClick #bto #bContinue. #b8 #bof #b9.
You can #yBrew potions to #yReact with other potions that have very high #yGrowth rates on the fly. NL NL #bClick #bto #bContinue. #b9 #bof #b9.
